title: Leibnitzia lyrata
taxonomy: I can find some information about Leibnitzia lyrata. Leibnitzia lyrata is a species of flowering plant in the aster family, Asteraceae. It is native to East Asia, specifically China. The plant is also known as the lyrated Leibnitzia or the Chinese Leibnitzia. Leibnitzia lyrata belongs to the tribe Anthemideae within the family Asteraceae.
uses: Leibnitzia lyrata is a plant native to the mountainous regions of Asia and the Himalayas. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its various health benefits. The plant's roots, leaves, and flowers are used to prepare remedies for treating various ailments. Leibnitzia lyrata is reported to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating conditions such as fever, diarrhea, and skin infections. Further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal plant.
